evals.title: Google RSA for Japan SaaS
evals.prompt: Write responsive search ad headlines and descriptions for a Japanese CRM SaaS. Target: small business owners in Japan. Key value: easy to use, affordable, 14-day free trial. Price: ¥2,980/month.
evals.expected_behavior: Should generate 8+ headlines and 4 descriptions within character limits, count characters correctly for Japanese, include mix of benefit/social proof/urgency/CTA angles, and use appropriate Japanese ad copy patterns.

evals.title: Meta carousel for e-commerce
evals.prompt: Create a Meta carousel ad for a Japanese skincare brand launching a new moisturizer. Target: women 25-40 in Japan. Price: ¥3,980. Key benefit: 72-hour moisture retention, dermatologist tested.
evals.expected_behavior: Should specify correct Meta specs (1080x1080 for carousel), write primary text within recommendation, create distinct card concepts, and include Japanese-appropriate copy avoiding 薬機法 violation.

evals.title: LINE Ads creative
evals.prompt: Write LINE ad copy for a food delivery service in Tokyo. Campaign goal: app installs. Budget: ¥300,000/month.
evals.expected_behavior: Should respect LINE's strict character limits (20 char title, 75 char description), note that title must work standalone, recommend natural/friendly tone appropriate for LINE, and provide image spec options.

evals.title: A/B test variations
evals.prompt: Our current Google ad headline is '業務効率化ツール | 無料で始める'. CTR is 2.1% which is below target. Generate A/B test variations.
evals.expected_behavior: Should analyze why current headline may underperform (generic, no specificity), generate multiple variations using different angles (benefit, social proof, urgency, question), and recommend testing one element at a time.

evals.title: Japan legal compliance check
evals.prompt: Review this ad copy for a Japanese supplement brand: '飲むだけで痩せる！業界No.1のダイエットサプリ。今だけ特別価格で販売中。'
evals.expected_behavior: Should flag multiple legal issues: 薬機法 violation (飲むだけで痩せる = efficacy claim for supplement), 景品表示法 violation (業界No.1 without evidence, 今だけ特別価格 if always discounted), and suggest compliant alternatives.
